title: scaevola oldfieldii
intro: Scaevola oldfieldii, also known as Devil's Shoestring, is a flowering plant native to North America that belongs to the Goodenia family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Scaevola oldfieldii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and calm the body and mind. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
